  "findings": [
    "Elongation record vs. calculated mismatch exceeds the allowable tolerance specified by PTI and building codes."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Report the elongation discrepancy to the structural engineer of record (SER) for evaluation.",
    "Do not cut the tendon tails until the SER has reviewed and approved the elongation records.",
    "Perform lift-off testing or recalibrate stressing equipment if directed by the engineer."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to PTI and ACI 318 standards, measured post-tensioning tendon elongations must agree with calculated values within a tolerance of +/- 7%. A mismatch outside this range indicates potential issues with friction, tendon placement, or gauge calibration, requiring engineering evaluation before acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "PTI Field Procedures Manual",
    "ACI 318 Chapter 26 (Concrete Design and Construction)"
  ]
}
